current.author: Operator
current.instructions: Replace `text` with 1-3 sentences capturing what the agents should internalize for tomorrow. Update daily after market close. Each daily run injects this into every agent context. Tip: paste today's signals.json + scoring.json into Perplexity or Grok with: 'What 2-3 sentence rule should trading agents internalize for tomorrow given these results?' Paste their reply into the text field below.
